zh.Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾賀斯可斯 班可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Hesketh II於大約1248年出生在英國藍卡爾賀斯可斯 班可時，他的父親John de Hesketh29歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Barron24歲。他和Matilda Fitton至少有3個兒子。他去世於1318年2月5日之後在英國藍卡爾盧福德。

zh-hans.Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾賀斯可斯 班可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Hesketh II于大约1248年出生在英国藍卡爾賀斯可斯 班可时，他的父亲John de Hesketh29岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Barron24岁。他和Matilda Fitton至少有3个儿子。他去世于1318年2月5日之后在英国藍卡爾盧福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hesketh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Hesketh (Lancashire), Hesketh Grange in Felixkirk (North Yorkshire), or Hesket in the Forest (Cumberland). The placenames derive from Old Norse hestr ‘horse, stallion’ + skeith ‘course, track, race course’. The ancient Scandinavians were fond of horse-racing and horse-fighting, and introduced both pastimes to England.

variants.name: Heskett
meanings: English (Cumberland and Lancashire): variant of   Hesketh  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Hesketh II was born about 1248, in Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Hesketh, was 29 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Barron, was 24. He had at least 3 sons with Matilda Fitton. He died after 5 February 1318, in Rufford, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Hesketh II est né environ 1248, à Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John de Hesketh, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Barron, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Matilda Fitton. Il est décédé après 5 février 1318, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Hesketh II um 1248 in Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Hesketh 29 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Barron 24. Er hatte mit Matilda Fitton mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 5. Februar 1318 in Rufford, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Hesketh II è nato il circa 1248 nel Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John de Hesketh, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Barron, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Matilda Fitton. Morì dopo il 5 febbraio 1318, nel Rufford, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Hesketh IIが約1248年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘスケス バンクで生まれた時，父John de Heskethは29歳，母Lady Elizabeth Barronは24歳であった。彼はMatilda Fittonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1318年2月5日以後にイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Hesketh II(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 랭카실르 헤스케스 뱅크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Hesketh(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Barron(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Matilda Fitton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1318년 2월 5일 이후 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1248–after 5 February 1318: ойролцоогоор 1248 он–1318 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 5–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Hesketh II nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Hesketh, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Barron, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Matilda Fitton. Ele faleceu após 5 de fevereiro de 1318, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Hesketh II родился около 1248 г. в местности хескет банк, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Hesketh было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Barron, 24. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Matilda Fitton. Он умер после 5 февраль 1318 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Hesketh II nació aproximadamente 1248, en Hesketh Bank, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Hesketh, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Barron, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Matilda Fitton. Murió después de 5 de febrero de 1318, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
